code:
def transform(xs):
    result = []
    for i in range(len(xs)):
        prev = xs[i-1] if i > 0 else 0
        curr = xs[i]
        next_val = xs[i+1] if i < len(xs)-1 else 0
        result.append(abs(curr - prev) + abs(curr - next_val) + 1)
    return result
